untranslatable_reason: Signal requires statistical tests (ADF/KPSS test, half-life calculation, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process characteristics) which are not available in the allowed indicator list. These are complex econometric tests that cannot be directly mapped to standard technical indicators. Approximated entry/exit using Bollinger Bands percentage B as a proxy for mean reversion deviation, but this is not statistically equivalent to the specified tests.
translation_notes: ADF/KPSS test confirmation cannot be implemented with available indicators. Half-life of mean reversion is a parameter calculated from time series analysis, not a standard indicator. Used bb_pct_b (Bollinger Bands %B) as a practical proxy: values < 0.0 suggest price below lower band (oversold/reverting down), values > 1.0 suggest price above upper band (overbought/reverting up). Exit when bb_pct_b crosses 0.1-0.9 range approximates 'price reverts to within 0.1 std dev of mean'. Stop-loss set to 1.5 standard deviations as specified. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal trades both long (when oversold) and short (when overbought).
